init_hook: unset NIX_CC NIX_CC_WRAPPER_TARGET_HOST_aarch64_apple_darwin NIX_BINTOOLS NIX_BINTOOLS_WRAPPER_TARGET_HOST_aarch64_apple_darwin NIX_CFLAGS_COMPILE NIX_LDFLAGS NIX_HARDENING_ENABLE NIX_ENFORCE_NO_NATIVE NIX_DONT_SET_RPATH NIX_IGNORE_LD_THROUGH_GCC
export PATH=$(echo "$PATH" | tr ':' '\n' | grep -Ev 'clang-wrapper|cctools-binutils' | tr '\n' ':' | sed 's/:$//')
if command -v xcode-select >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DYLD_FRAMEWORK_PATH="$(xcode-select -p)/usr/lib${DYLD_FRAMEWORK_PATH:+:$DYLD_FRAMEWORK_PATH}"; fi
